name: cc-edge-gemini-antigravity
author: VisiCore Tech - CriblPacks@VisiCoreTech.com
description: Cribl Edge Pack that collects Gemini CLI session logs, chat history, settings, and Antigravity IDE application logs, agent brain data, and annotations from the local filesystem, then forwards them to a Cribl Stream worker group for indexing, analysis, and search. Each data source gets a unique datatype metadata value for downstream sourcetype mapping.
displayName: Gemini CLI & Antigravity Pack For Edge
